ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's code repository */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "last_build_status" TEXT /* Status of the last build (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "ci_cd_pipeline_url" TEXT /* URL of the CI/CD pipeline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the class belongs to */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the class file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was last updated */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the class */,
  "complexity_score" REAL /* Initial complexity score for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the method belongs to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Return type of the method */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number where the method is defined */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was last updated */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of method (e.g., static, instance, abstract) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method the metric belongs to */,
  "complexity" REAL /* Cyclomatic complexity of the method */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Test coverage of the method */,
  "uncovered_elements" INTEGER /* Number of uncovered elements in the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., complexity, coverage, performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the test belongs to */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was last updated */,
  "last_run_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was last run */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test run in seconds */,
  "test_framework" TEXT /* Testing framework used (e.g., JUnit, PyTest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the result belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric the result belongs to */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Test coverage of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was last updated */,
  "passed" INTEGER /* Number of tests passed */,
  "failed" INTEGER /* Number of tests failed */,
  "skipped" INTEGER /* Number of tests skipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, team lead, QA engineer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_access" (
  "project_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project access */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with access to the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user has access to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project access was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project access was last updated */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
